tagline: Enjoy stress-free pool ownership with a service and maintenance team you can count on

hero.headline: Madison's Most Trusted Pool Care Team
hero.subheadline: With technicians averaging 10-30 years of hands-on experience, New Wave Pools has kept southern Wisconsin swimming since 2013. Stop worrying about water chemistry and equipment failures — we handle everything so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care<br class="hidden md:block">for Southern Wisconsin
services.subtitle: From seasonal openings to emergency repairs, our award-winning team handles every aspect of pool and hot tub ownership so you can focus on enjoying your backyard.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Professional seasonal startup and winterization to protect your investment through Wisconsin's harsh winters. Equipment inspection, chemical balancing, and freeze protection included.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Flexible maintenance programs with water chemistry testing, chemical balancing, skimming, and vacuuming. Digital reporting through our customer portal keeps you informed.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of heaters, pumps, filters, salt systems, and automation controls. Fully stocked service vehicles mean most repairs are completed same-visit.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Custom-fitted vinyl liners from Merlin Industries, Latham, and TARA. Refresh your pool's appearance and ensure watertight performance with precision installation.

cards.title: Auto Cover Services
cards.description: Installation, repair, and maintenance of automatic pool covers for enhanced safety, reduced evaporation, and cleaner water year-round.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Management
cards.description: Full-service programs for hotels, community pools, and athletic facilities. Compliance support, chemical management, and dedicated account coordination included.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Worry-Free Pool Ownership

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form with details about your pool. We'll schedule an on-site assessment and provide an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Handle the Hard Part
steps.description: Our experienced, PHTA-certified technicians arrive on schedule with fully stocked vehicles. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, repairs — all covered and documented in your customer portal.

steps.title: Dive In and Relax
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season long. Backed by our one-year workmanship warranty and satisfaction guarantee — if something's not right, we fix it free.

about.label: Why Madison Trusts New Wave
about.headline: 13 Years of Award-Winning Pool Care in Southern Wisconsin
about.description: New Wave Pools has been the go-to pool service for southern Wisconsin families since 2013. Our lead technicians bring a minimum of 10 years of experience — with senior staff carrying up to 30 years in the industry. We're locally owned, fully insured, and proud recipients of multiple Superior Service Awards and GuildMaster Honor awards. Every technician arrives in a fully stocked vehicle, ready to solve problems on the spot.

features.title: Veteran Technicians, 10-30 Yrs Exp.
features.description: Every technician on our team brings deep, hands-on experience. No rookies learning on your pool — just seasoned pros who've seen it all.

features.title: One-Year Workmanship Warranty
features.description: We stand behind every job with a full one-year warranty. If something we did isn't right, we come back and make it right at no charge.

features.title: 100% Satisfaction Guarantee
features.description: 117 out of 117 surveyed customers recommend us on GuildQuality. We're committed to earning that trust with every single visit.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service level that fits your pool and budget. Flexible scheduling, no hidden fees, and no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our One-Year Workmanship Guarantee
guarantee.description: Every job we complete is backed by a full one-year workmanship warranty. If you're not completely satisfied, call us and we'll return to make it right — no questions asked, no extra charges. We've earned a 100% recommendation rate because we never leave a customer unsatisfied.

faqs.question: How soon can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within one week. For urgent equipment failures or emergency situations, we offer priority same-week response. Call us at 608-444-8850 and we'll get you on the calendar.

faqs.question: Do you service hot tubs as well?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer dedicated hot tub maintenance programs to keep your spa clean, chemically balanced, and running efficiently year-round. Same experienced technicians, same attention to detail.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve all of southern Wisconsin including Madison, Sun Prairie, Verona, Middleton, Cottage Grove, Stoughton, Lake Mills, and Chenequa. If you're nearby, give us a call — we likely cover your area.

faqs.question: Are your technicians certified?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our team holds PHTA and NSPF certifications, and our lead technicians bring 10-30 years of hands-on experience. We're also fully insured and back all work with a one-year workmanship warranty.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools?
faqs.answer: We do. We manage pools for hotels, community centers, athletic facilities, and HOA properties. Commercial clients receive compliance support, chemical management programs, and dedicated account coordination.

testimonials.name: Larry T.
testimonials.text: We called every pool place in greater Madison. None even called us back. Except New Wave -- we were very relieved. They've been outstanding ever since.

testimonials.name: Jack H.
testimonials.text: I have NEVER had a problem with them. After using other companies in the past, with many problems, we will never use any other company but New Wave.

testimonials.name: Amanda K.
testimonials.text: New Wave Pools is prompt, efficient, reasonable, and professional. We have used a lot of pool companies and they're the best!

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Swim-Ready?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-pressure quote from Madison's most trusted pool team. No contracts, no commitments — just honest service backed by a one-year warranty.
